uk.name: Озеро Куровичі

uk.name: Пруд у Прилбичах

uk.name: Пруд у Солуках

uk.name: Щирецьке водосховище

uk.name: Озеро в Брюховичах

uk.name: База «Дружба»
uk.description: Рибальська база з кількома глибинами та перспективою на хижака.

en.name: Kurovychi Lake

en.name: Prylbychi Pond
en.description: A sport fishing water with paid access where feeder and float rigs work well.

en.name: Soluky Pond

en.name: Shchyrets Reservoir
en.description: A popular spot for crucian carp, bream and medium carp.

en.name: Briukhovychi Lake
en.description: A city-side trip with good float and light feeder spots.

en.name: Druzhba Fishing Base
en.description: A fishing base with several depth zones and predator opportunities.
